fields.title: Fix backlog list renderer showing raw JSON instead of compact issue rows
fields.description: The backlog list command returns raw JSON to the chat instead of rendering through the custom renderIssuesBlock renderer. The renderResult handler in tool.ts should be producing themed compact issue rows but appears to not be activating. Investigate why details are not populated or why renderResult falls through to raw text output. Same may affect ready/blocked/search commands that share the same render path.
